name: 10X Capital Venture Acquisition Corp. II Warrant
summary: 10X Capital Venture Acquisition Corp. II Warrant represents the right to purchase shares of the company's common stock at a specified price. The underlying company is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on identifying opportunities in the technology sector.
